programme.title: The Bounty
programme.desc: The story of a 1789 mutiny on the H.M.S. Bounty in which a voyage to Tahiti turns a crew against it's Captain when they find tropical paradise and unlimited sex, but the Captain decides to leave and take his crew on a perilous voyage around Cape Horn.

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: A Hollywood stunt performer (Ryan Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: Traffic
programme.desc: A conservative judge is appointed by the President to spearhead America's escalating war against drugs, only to discover that his teenage daughter is an addict.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: In Mississippi it's an epic David vs. Goliath battle as three young guns go up against three of the biggest names in poker for a river of cash – over $5,000,000.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Southern California is rockin' and rollin' as the WPT shakes up Los Angeles with the largest prize pool in west coast history.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The WPT extends an invitation to glory and some of the best in the game RSVP as the World Poker Tour and LA's Commerce Casino play host to the WPT Invitational.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: A $4,000,000 prize pool is in the crosshairs and everybody is gunning for glory at the final table of the WPT Bay 101 Shooting Star.

programme.title: Capote
programme.desc: In 1959, Truman Capote, learns about the horrific and senseless murder of a family of four in Kansas. As he digs deeper into the story, he is inspired to expand the project into what would be his greatest work, In Cold Blood.

programme.title: Last Tango in Paris
programme.desc: Marlon Brando delivers a fascinating performance as a man torn apart by his wife's suicide who attempts to bury his grief in a sudden, purely carnal relationship with an alluring stranger.

programme.title: Toy Soldiers
programme.desc: When Colombian drug kingpin Enrique Cali (Jesse Doran) is extradited to the U.S., his son, Luis (Andrew Divoff), devises a ruthless plan to win his freedom. Rating: R

programme.title: Invasion U.S.A.
programme.desc: An army of terrorist mercenaries led by Soviet agent Rostov catches America unprepared and makes it a war zone from sea to shining sea. Only one man can stem the rising tide of violence: retired agent and martial arts expert Matt Hunter.

programme.title: Double Impact
programme.desc: Identical twins are separated at six months and raised on different continents. They reunite twenty-five years later to avenge the murder of their parents and reclaim their stolen family fortune.

programme.title: Enemies Closer
programme.desc: Deep within a forest on the US-Canadian border, two sworn enemies must work together to escape a ruthless drug cartel hell-bent on retrieving a drug shipment which went missing there.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: The tables turn when a seasoned hostage negotiator takes hostages and risks all to prove his own innocence.

programme.title: The Client
programme.desc: The Mafia wants to keep 11-year-old Mark Sway quiet, and a federal prosecutor wants to learn exactly what he knows. So Mark finds a lawyer who's smart and tough, and she wants to help him. If he can only trust her…

programme.title: The Ninth Gate
programme.desc: A rare book dealer, while seeking out the last two copies of a demon text, gets drawn into a conspiracy with supernatural overtones. Starring: Johnny Depp, Frank Langella, Lena Olin

programme.title: True Confessions
programme.desc: Two of the finest actors of our time, Robert De Niro and Robert Duvall, star in this must-see tale of two brothers set on a collision course as the result of a brutal murder in 1940s Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Titan
programme.desc: As Earth becomes inhabitable, the human race must find a new home. Hotshot Air Force pilot, Rick is chosen by the military to be made capable of surviving on a new planet.

programme.title: Invasion Roswell
programme.desc: Sixty-six years after the Roswell crash, aliens return to attack Earth. Elite commandos come out of retirement to battle the extraterrestrial onslaught.

programme.title: Transference
programme.desc: The wife of a CIA agent seeks the truth, after she discovers that her husband’s accident was part of an inside job.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Argentina
programme.desc: A dairy farmer drives his Mad Max style lorry - half bus, half tractor - through swamped lagoons to deliver his farm's milk.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Benin
programme.desc: Travellers make a white knuckle journey to cross \\"The River Of Death\\".

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: China
programme.desc: A lifeline for the numerous villages in the region, the Duong Valley road is the only link between China, Burma, and Tibet. The film crew joins locals (and a very special pig!), aboard a collective taxi to explore the region.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Chief Pilot Arnie lands the DC-3 on a homemade sand strip at a remote lodge. Electra expert Chuck goes one-on-one with a stubborn power unit, and Rod's wife Sasha goes into labour with the newest member of the McBryan family.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Yukon
programme.desc: When thunderstorms and a shaking engine threaten a DC-3 charter to Whitehorse, Joe pulls out all the stops to get the passengers to their destination. Patient C-46 co-pilot Scott Blue finally gets his crack at the DC-4.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: British Invasion
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head off to Coventry, England to navigate the potential purchase of an Electra turboprop to add to Buffalo's fleet of fire-fighting tanker planes. The father-son duo makes a great team.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Arnie Calls It
programme.desc: While training waterbomber captains for the upcoming fire-fighting season, Chief Pilot Arnie makes a surprising decision. AJ becomes a DC-4 captain and ponders whether to accept a promotion.

programme.title: The Human Centipede (First Sequence)
programme.desc: A mad scientist kidnaps and mutilates a trio of tourists in order to reassemble them into a human centipede.

programme.title: Carrie (2013)
programme.desc: Chloë Grace Moretz and Julianne Moore star in this exhilarating reimagining of Stephen King's iconic best-seller, 'Carrie.' After merciless taunting and abuse, events spiral out of control until the terrifying conclusion of this horror story.

programme.title: The Human Centipede 2 (Full Sequence)
programme.desc: Inspired by the fictional Dr. Heiter, disturbed loner Martin dreams of creating a 12-person centipede and sets out to realize his sick fantasy.

programme.title: 1970 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Football entertainment for fans! Watch documentaries, original series and select live matches as well as historic moments from the FIFA World Cup™️, FIFA Club World Cup™️, FIFA Women's World Cup™️ and more.

programme.title: A Look Back
programme.desc: The historic triumph of Argentina in the 1978 World Cup on home soil.

programme.title: Life in GB
programme.desc: In this intimate film, we go behind the scenes with South Korean international Hwang Hee-Chan for a day, as he learns to adjust to a new life in Wolverhampton, England.

programme.title: 1970 FIFA World Cup

programme.title: Remember Me
programme.desc: Emerging secrets threaten the budding romance between a troubled young man and the young woman who helped him rediscover happiness.

programme.title: Cosmopolis
programme.desc: A 28-year-old billionaire (Robert Pattinson) senses his empire collapsing around him as he takes a limo ride across Manhattan to get a haircut from his father's old barber.

programme.title: Maps to the Stars
programme.desc: Meet the Weiss family, who are making their way in Hollywood rife with money, fame, and relentless hauntings.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Rocket Method
programme.desc: Ronnie O'Sullivan teaches snooker fundamentals, guiding viewers through the essential skills and techniques to improve their game, the Rocket Method.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Live Snooker 900, the new fast and exciting version of the game featuring many of the game’s legendary players in weekly competitions.

programme.title: Curse of The Ancients
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts reveals how archaeologists unveil one of history's most mysterious periods. After Rome's collapse, Saxons and Vikings rampaged through Europe, but then these pagan societies seemed to disappear. Where did they go? And why?

programme.title: Curse of The Ancients
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts looks at one of the most cursed periods in European history: the Middle Ages. Archaeologists reveal how wars, pandemics, and cataclysmic floods toppled the world of our ancestors. So how did Western society survive?

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands: Episode 1
programme.desc: Join a voyage to Farne Islands, home to seals and seabirds, early Christian communities and one of the first landing sites for the terrifying Viking raiders.

programme.title: Britain's Secret Islands: Episode 2
programme.desc: Starting on the Isle of Lewis in the Outer Hebrides, witness the 5,000-year-old standing stones of Callanish, traditional Scottish blackhouses, and cut peat with a modern crofter.

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt begins not with diamonds and gold, but with skin and bone, unearthed in the dangerous wilds of Russia's arctic Yamal Peninsula. But was this ice-age discovery doomed?

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt starts in Turin with the controversial Shroud, moves to Ice Age Spain and a fraud-tainted discovery, then to Manchester where a statue seems to move and ends with the cursed blue diamond tied to misery and bloodshed.

programme.title: With These Hands
programme.desc: An unscrupulous, beautiful, proprietor of a London health clinic offers her clients 'added extras', but after administering the spankings she blackmails the customers. Cheeky sex comedy.

programme.title: Beneath the Valley of the Ultra-Vixens
programme.desc: Believe it or not even in Smalltown USA there are still people who are unfulfilled and unrelieved in the midst of plenty. Levonna and Lamar could have the perfect relationship if it were not Lamar's obsession with rear entry.

programme.title: Playbirds
programme.desc: British sex-bomb, Mary Millington, stars as a policewoman who goes undercover to find out who is stalking and killing glamour models. Expect nothing to stay undercover for long in this raunchy British classic! Starring: Glynn Edwards, Gavin Campbell

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Believing Cyril is dying, Bert spends his savings on a tribute monument. When Cyril learns he is fine, he exploits the situation to sabotage the Evergreen Standard, forcing Bert to recover from his costly mistake quickly.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Cedric meet a hermit living in a swamp rumored to hold oil. Cyril attempts to buy the land, threatening the hermit’s home. The gang must protect the swamp and prove its worth beyond the profit Cyril seeks.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A misunderstanding leads everyone to believe Cyril is marrying Lady Baden-Baden. Cedric questions his past while Mr. Knox hides his feelings for her. As confusion grows, truths come out and relationships are tested.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: The pigs invent a time machine, which Cyril uses to alter past events for personal gain. However, his meddling causes chaos in the present, forcing the gang to fix the timeline before things spiral completely out of control.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril borrows a priceless diamond for a film, but it disappears. Bert investigates while Cyril tries to hide the loss from Lady Baden-Baden and Mr. Knox, leading to a frantic search filled with misdirection and secrets.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Adventurer Sir Malcolm invites Bert on an expedition, which Cyril secretly funds for treasure. As Bert seeks adventure and discovery, Cyril’s greed threatens the mission, putting everyone in danger along the way.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril’s failing chip business leads him to stage a fake contest to boost sales. Bert gets caught up and wastes money, realizing too late it’s a scam. The gang must expose the truth before others are tricked as well.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Daredevil biker Bix arrives and impresses Bert, but his reckless actions cause trouble that Cedric gets blamed for. Bert must recognize the difference between excitement and responsibility before friendships are damaged.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A supposed lake monster draws tourists to Evergreen Forest. Cyril exploits the craze by selling merchandise, while Bert and Melissa investigate the truth behind the sightings and reveal what is really going on.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: The pigs’ mother visits, believing her sons are wealthy. To maintain the lie, they scramble to impress her while hiding the truth. Meanwhile, Cyril faces pressure as their deception spirals out of control.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Melissa captures heroic photos of Snag and gains media attention. As fame grows, Snag is offered a TV role, but must decide if he wants the spotlight or a simpler life with his friends in the forest.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Jesse knows you don’t strike it big if you play it safe, so he gambles on a safe he hopes will pay off big time. Then, Lori’s fiery bid on a lackluster unit brings out a dragon’s roar from Brandon.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: A deathly bin sends buyers spinning and throws everybody on edge. Then, Brandon and Lori square off against Scott and Chrissy with explosive attacks and counter-attacks. Emotion, rather than strategy, threatens to rule the day.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Arch enemies Brandon and Jesse drop their guard to team up against a new threat. Then, it’s back to the future when Desert Dan risks all on a tire and a hunch.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The potential for big money brings out fierce competition at this rare high stakes RV auction, and Brandon and Lori are determined to keep Scott and Chrissy from walking away with a score.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: A strange obsession and a peepshow surprise our bidders, and a sinister swarm scares some of them off -- but do the birds know where the money lies? Jesse starts an all-out blind bid battle, betting on a unit without ever seeing the inside.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Brandon and Scott ignore their wives’ advice and bid hard against each other for a bowling bin— but did the winner throw a gutter ball, or a lucky strike? T Money is determined to hit the jackpot on a bin with an ATM, but is it worth the gamble?

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The heat is on in Vegas where Scott, Brandon and Lori have come to see if they can strike it rich... and not just in the casinos. And guess who’s back? In this boom or bust town, the chance for a big score has also lured Brandon’s nemesis.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Dustin Taylor emerges from the Mississippi swamps to renew his challenge against Brandon and Lori in Vegas. The fight is on, but a mystery bin’s magic might keep Dustin in check.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: A rumor that Sean will be auctioning vehicles draws buyers out to the foothills -- but the real content of these containers is anybody’s guess. Brandon and Lori try to beat back the competition on a container that might hold antiques.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Jesse, Brandon, and Lori are determined to play each other for a unit full of cinder blocks...and maybe much more. A swarm of bees throws the auction into chaos—Brandon’s life is at stake due to his allergy to bees.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The first bin of the day gives new meaning to the phrase “business in a box.” The door opens to reveal… another door! It’s an actual storefront that conceals all the contents of the bin.

programme.desc: Willie thinks his kids have been spending too much time on their phones and other devices so he initiates a "No-Tech Week," but when he has to participate too it ends up being harder than he thought. There's a lice outbreak at Duck Command.

programme.desc: This second episode covers the last week of March to late April. The cameramen covered many stories of victory and defeat, death and liberation. Faces of despair and joy, scenes of war and peace.

programme.title: Gestapo: Hitler's Secret Police
programme.desc: Hermann Goering’s Secret State Police were tasked to arrest and torture confessions and information from supposed enemies of the Reich.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Building The Brand
programme.desc: Hitler’s fascination with propaganda was born in the trenches of the First World War. There he saw it emerge as a potent tool of psychological warfare - one that he would harness to build the Nazi movement. Witness Hitler's early propaganda tactics.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Power and Persuasion
programme.desc: This episode explores Hitler's approach to propaganda in power; where persuasion was achieved through propaganda and terror, all in service of one goal: the creation of a state under one shared ideology. A new German power fueled by propaganda.

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Veterans and historians of the Thai-Burma railway tell the story of its construction. Built to supply Japan’s invasion of India, it cost thousands of lives – both POWs and Asian slave labourers.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Sex Life: Body Image
programme.desc: Hitler wanted the world to believe he possessed super-human qualities but in private he was a wreck. This episode reveals the archives that confirm Hitler’s genital deformity, the alarming truth about his heavy drug addiction and the Parkinson’s.

programme.title: Hell On Earth WWII
programme.desc: The bloodiest months of the war are still ahead. A Soviet surge pushes German forces back to within 30 kilometres of the Polish Border. The siege at Leningrad is lifted after 900 days and Operation Overlord, D-Day, opens a second front in Europe.

programme.title: Apocalypse D-Day
programme.desc: Spring 1944: The Allies aim to end Hitler's domination of Western Europe. In the south of England, troops are being trained in the greatest secrecy for a gigantic amphibious operation.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Deadly Inventions

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the 50-Foot Irma
programme.desc: While the Turtles are planning Irma's birthday party, Shredder steals an Exaboron Isotope from a meteorite crash. Krang creates an Exaboron-powered Enlarging Ray which causes six times normal growth, with the intention of using it on Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Maltese Hamster
programme.desc: Shredder gives futuristic laser weapons to mobster Tony Vivaldi and his underlings. Shredder wants to find the Maltese Hamster statue of him, which has inside it the formula for ultimate fuel for the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sky Turtles
programme.desc: Krang creates a Gravity Altering Device which causes everyone in the city, including the Turtles, to start floating.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Old Switcheroo
programme.desc: Two huge electrodes at Cybertech Labs produce a startling effect on two long-time foes. The mind of the Turtles master Splinter winds up in the body of the evil Shredder - and vice versa, causing confusion among their associates.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Burne's Blues
programme.desc: Burne is out to prove to April that he can still dig in the trenches and find good stories after deriding her for failing to come up with anything good lately.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Fifth Turtle
programme.desc: On the occasion of a rare conjunction of the Earth, Moon, and Stars, Shredder steals some Capsidium Crystals.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Rat King
programme.desc: April does a story on the rat problem the city is facing, and the Rat King kidnaps her. The Rat King is the leader of all the rats under his form of government known as the Ratocracy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles at the Earth's Core
programme.desc: The Turtles venture down to the Earth's core and discover a lost prehistoric world complete with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Foolish
programme.desc: Emperor Aleister and his daughter Princess Mallory arrive from the small kingdom of Malacuria where there has been a recent discovery of a vast deposit of Lydium - 90, the most powerful source of energy found on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Big MACC
programme.desc: At an army testing lab where a super laser is being demonstrated, the crowd is surprised by the arrival of MACC, a robot from the year 2399 that talks like a cowboy from watching old western movies on inter-dimensional trips.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ninja Sword of Nowhere
programme.desc: Krang detects the existence of an alien metal that could help him conquer the Earth. It happens to be on a Ninja Sword the Turtles have purchased for Splinter as a National Sensei Appreciation Day gift.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: Hairadee arrives seeking vengeance against Skyress, sparking a fierce battle. Shun and Komba are transported to a desolate castle, preventing their interference, whilst Harpus is destroyed.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: The situation looks grim for Wavern and the Infinity Core. They have taken refuge atop Wardington Tower, but Naga and his forces are closing in.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: Naga traps Wavern, seemingly forcing her to surrender the Infinity Core to her evil brother. However, Dan and Drago arrive just in time.

programme.title: Bakugan
programme.desc: As Drago nears defeat and evil seems set to triumph, the Brawlers arrive with their Bakugan. Uniting their forces, they successfully protect the Infinity Core.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The connection between Earth and Vestroia is becoming weaker and weaker. When Dan and Athena learn of this, they take the initiative. A journey to Auropolis is their last hope for a possible rescue and reversal of the situation.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Dan and Athena discover that the Swarm have been absorbing vast amounts of Earth's energy, and it turns out that Magnus has been leading the Awesome Brawlers to help defend the planet.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers have an uphill battle ahead of them. They battle against an ultra-powerful Bakugan villain, Hanoj, whose only objective is to devour all of Earth and Vestroia's energy.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: As the Awesome Brawlers train for the Battle Judgement, they learn of a new Core called the 'Nova Core'. Dan and Drago use its mysterious new powers against an unexpected opponent.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers split up as they attempt to master the new Nova technique. Lia does her best to protect a couple of children from a local bully.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers continue to look to their individual skill sets and experiences to help them master the Nova technique. Meanwhile, Athena faces an old foe at the Bakugan Academy.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Dan and his friends have to compete with their Bakugan against the ultimate villain, Hanoj. To do this, they use the new Nova technology. However, Dan continues to struggle with his mastery of the new tech.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Dan, Lia and Wynton fend off a gang of outlaws in an old-time Western theme park.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: In the first Battle Judgement match, Ajit must revisit his past while the others help protect island residents from a Swarm invasion.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: As the Awesome Brawlers return to Brakistan for the next Battle Judgement match, they discover that Lord Brakken's uncle Tim has mysteriously assumed the throne.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Mc Q and Everett Ray are chosen once again as Hanoi's brawlers in the third match, this time against Ajit and Shun. Meanwhile, a deadly tornado threatens to wreak havoc over Brakistan.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: The Awesome Brawlers attempt to capture a Swarm Bakugan and use its portal capabilities to return to Vestroia.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: When Veronica Venegas interviews the viral superstar Cubbo on her television show, the Awesome Brawlers are shocked to hear him telling a wide variety of lies to make himself look good.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Shun and Lightning volunteer to brawl in the fourth Battle Judgement match taking place in downtown Los Volmos while Dan and Lia protect the city's residents from the Swarm's attack.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Dan and Drago must save the day when an old enemy threatens to plunge Los Volmos into crisis.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: A surprise attack from a group of Ursaring has our heroes and Team Rocket running for cover. In the chaos, the groups are split up, and the unenthusiastic pairings are forced to work together. But for how long?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: After seeing a sign in the forest warning them about mischievous Ghost-type Pokémon, our heroes reach a town whose residents use Psychic types to repel them. But soon some spooky news arrives: a giant Gengar is on the loose!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: A sudden craze in Pokémon fortune-telling turns out to be a plot to steal Pokémon from local Trainers. But Jessie, James and Meowth aren't behind it this time! Who are these con artists?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Arriving in Goldenrod City, Ash is ready for his next Gym battle, but the Gym appears to be closed. Their plans delayed, our heroes decide to explore the vibrant city.

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: After losing to Whitney at the Goldenrod Gym, Ash is thinking of a rematch with her powerful Miltank. When Whitney suggests a trip to a Miltank dairy, it’s just the chance he's is looking for!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: With his new Gym badge in hand, Ash is asked to appear on a local radio station. But while he's acting out a radio drama with some 'professional actors,' the scripted danger becomes all too lifelike!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A Bug Pokémon Catching Contest turns into a hive of activity when Ash goes up against his rival Casey—and it isn’t long before the Team Rocket villains swarm the scene, intent on catching a few things for themselves…

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: On the way to Ecruteak City, our heroes are trapped on the wrong side of a river. To get across, they first have to find a Sudowoodo...which, even for an expert, is no easy feat!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: When an ex-student of Professor Oak’s discovers some restored Omanyte and Omastar in the wild, our heroes are called into action to save these prehistoric Pokémon from harsh times with Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: The Pidgey Express courier service is in need of our heroes' helping hands, especially when Team Rocket wants to have the delivery Pidgey signed, sealed, and delivered to the Boss!

programme.desc: The Princess falls into the Fountain of Youth, transforming her into a baby. Now, the Mario Bros. have to protect her while looking for a way to reverse it.

programme.desc: A grudging hostility is aroused between the Brothers when they are Kooped up in Toad's cottage./Using a magic wand, King Koopa sucks the TV hero Mighty Plumber from the television.

programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have arrived in Rap Land, because King Koopa had kidnapped Rap Land's king, and is attempting to take everyone's money by playing an eerie theme throughout the land.

programme.desc: Mario and his friends set out for Darkland and the Temple of Gloom./Mario, Luigi and the Princess go to the real world to see Milli Vanilli in concert.

programme.desc: Princess Toadstool is fed up with Koopa and challenges him to try and win an election./Koopa announces that he is giving up being bad for good!

programme.desc: In the oriental city of Sayonara, Mario, Toad, Princess Toadstool and Luigi, who is pulling the cart Mario, Toad and Princess Toadstool are riding, are searching for a weapon that can help them defeat King Koopa, Super Sushi.

programme.desc: Mario and Co head to the Linguini Empire to attend a benefit spaghetti dinner. When they arrive, Princess and Toad are separated from the Marios and meet Koopa, who's taken over.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Too Hot to Handle

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Toad Warriors
programme.desc: In the badlands of Car Land, Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad are riding in a brown convertible car, planning on rendezvousing with several Mushroom rebels.

programme.title: Traffic
programme.desc: A conservative judge is appointed by the President to spearhead America's escalating war against drugs, only to discover that his teenage daughter is an addict.

programme.title: The Way Back: The Way Back (2011)
programme.desc: A small band of convicts stage a daring escape from a World War II-era Siberian gulag, and embark on a treacherous journey across five countries in a race for freedom and survival.

programme.title: Bigger
programme.desc: A rags-to-riches biopic of visionary Joe Weider, set in the world of fitness. Brothers Joe & Ben Weider were the architects of muscle.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: A $4,000,000 prize pool is in the crosshairs and everybody is gunning for glory at the final table of the WPT Bay 101 Shooting Star.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's a titanic payout on the Pacific Ocean as the World Poker Tour goes Crusin' Mexico onboard a luxury liner and comes up with a double millionaire night.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: In Reno it's a race to the finish as an established Poker Pro battles a wave of undiscovered talent for a 1.7 million dollar prize pool and a seat in next week's WPT World Championship.

programme.title: Toy Soldiers
programme.desc: When Colombian drug kingpin Enrique Cali (Jesse Doran) is extradited to the U.S., his son, Luis (Andrew Divoff), devises a ruthless plan to win his freedom. Rating: R

programme.title: But I'm a Cheerleader: But I'm a Cheerleader
programme.desc: A cheerleading-obsessed teenager is sent to a strict summer camp when her parents suspect her of being a lesbian.

programme.title: Revenge of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: Peter Sellers’ comedic genius shines when the hapless Inspector Clouseau is presumed to be dead. However, the very much alive Inspector travels to Hong Kong to investigate a dangerous drug lord (Robert Webber). Dyan Cannon and Herbert Lom also star.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: The tables turn when a seasoned hostage negotiator takes hostages and risks all to prove his own innocence.

programme.title: The Battle of Midway: Dauntless
programme.desc: A U.S. carrier group is positioned off the coast of Midway in June 1942. During the battle, the two-man crew of a U.S. Navy dive bomber is forced to ditch in the sea. Amid the vast openness of the Pacific, the men are forced to face their own mortality.

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former prot‚g‚ to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: True Confessions
programme.desc: Two of the finest actors of our time, Robert De Niro and Robert Duvall, star in this must-see tale of two brothers set on a collision course as the result of a brutal murder in 1940s Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: Sterling Brooks, a self-absorbed stock broker, is killed in a freak golfing accident. In order to secure a heavenly future, Sterling is given the opportunity to help a needy young girl reunite with her family in time for Christmas.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: In this suspenseful thriller, a high-priced and ruthless jury "consultant" will stop at nothing to secure a verdict on an explosive trial.

programme.title: Transference
programme.desc: The wife of a CIA agent seeks the truth, after she discovers that her husband’s accident was part of an inside job.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: A scientific researcher who has become unstuck in time must figure out what happened to him and stop the coming end of the world.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Arnie Calls It
programme.desc: While training waterbomber captains for the upcoming fire-fighting season, Chief Pilot Arnie makes a surprising decision. AJ becomes a DC-4 captain and ponders whether to accept a promotion.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Hard Hat & Home
programme.desc: Beat delivers a home in Utah to a frugal client who wants to do everything for himself, André and Joel build competing chicken coop mansions, while André covets a magazine cover story.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Jolly Ole Island
programme.desc: Joel assembles a millionaire’s retreat on a private island in England, Beat gets an emotional assignment, and Peter cannot take a vacation until he completes an HQ remodel for The Chief’s return.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Peter in a Pickle
programme.desc: Peter goes to Scotland and discovers that his boss Bryan Sr. has followed, Beat and André face a client with buyer’s remorse, while Joel agrees to build an elaborate doghouse and birdhouse, all for a slice of cake.

programme.title: The Human Centipede 2 (Full Sequence)
programme.desc: Inspired by the fictional Dr. Heiter, disturbed loner Martin dreams of creating a 12-person centipede and sets out to realize his sick fantasy.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Power
programme.desc: Brady aids the heirs of a Middle East king, who has been murdered by his power-crazy army chief to regain their father's throne.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Point of Destruction
programme.desc: Four tragic air accidents seem to point to the failure of a fuel diffuser being tested, but Peter suspects sabotage is at play.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Power
programme.desc: Brady aids the heirs of a Middle East king, who has been murdered by his power-crazy army chief to regain their father's throne.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Shadow Bomb

programme.desc: Found among the wreckage of a crashed plane are parts of an atomic bomb and Peter uncovers a plot to start a Third World War.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a loving wife and mother is found shot to death in her own bed, the case goes cold for two years until determined detectives set their sights on justice and reveal a murder-for-hire plot.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Do Unto Others

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Take Your Daughter to Work Day
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: In Sickness and In Health
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bonds of Love
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way."

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Automation Frustration
programme.desc: Willie buys a 3D printer for the office that starts off as a fun distraction for the guys until it appears the printer could soon replace their jobs. Si is upset that Willie invested in the 3D printer and didn't give him a raise.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Razing the Snakes
programme.desc: Jase, Jep, Si and Cole try to fight back a growing population of cottonmouth snakes on Phil's property. Meanwhile, Willie uses his business expertise to help Rebecca improve her clothing store.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Uneasy Rider
programme.desc: Willie puts Little Will on a budget for his first car but it backfires when Will decides to get a motorcycle instead. Jase and the guys are inspired to design a product using zip lines that will revolutionize duck hunting.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Willie Hunting
programme.desc: While many of the guys' wives and children are in Africa doing charity work, Willie and Jase get into a debate over tracking ability which leads to a challenge--can Jase and Si track and capture Willie and Jep?

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sleep Cover
programme.desc: With Korie still in Africa, Willie and Jep must step in and supervise Bella's sleepover. When a couple boys play a prank on the girls, Willie and Jep prove to be the perfect chaperones for the task.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drive-In Revivin'
programme.desc: Korie challenges Willie to come up with a romantic gesture without spending any money. Missy and Jase compete to see who can find a girlfriend for Mountain Man.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: When Doves Fry
programme.desc: Jase and Jep make a deal with Mia and Merritt to get them to go dove hunting with them. Si tries to make some extra cash by starting a West Monroe tour.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Carpnado
programme.desc: Jumping Asian carp have invaded Monroe's waters so Jase and the guys set out to try to stop them from spreading further. Meanwhile, Willie and Si have to run Willie's Duck Diner for the day.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Campfire Diaries
programme.desc: The family spends a weekend at their childhood summer camp, reliving old memories and working to repair a tennis court Willie built twenty years ago. While at the camp, Jep tries to pass a lifeguard swimming test he failed as a teenager.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Rowdy's Big Day
programme.desc: Rowdy's adoption is finalized and he officially becomes a Robertson. Jase gets his first massage and enjoys it more than he expected.

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help a bullied orphan whose eccentric grandfather is in danger of losing him to a heartless social worker.

programme.desc: Jonathan must help his own widow regain her love for life.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard travels to England to investigate Britain's Roswell, also known as the Woodbridge-Bentwaters UFO incident, considered by many to be one of the best documented UFO cases on record

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Mokele Mbembe
programme.desc: Mokele Mbembe means able to stem the flow of rivers. The Pygmies there say they have encountered just such a creature and according to their descriptions, this behemoth is a dead ringer for an Apotosaurus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Murder of Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Birthers - Obama's Birth Certificate
programme.desc: Richard interviews several prominent 'Birthers' who present evidence that proves Barack Obama is not eligible to be President because he does not meet the qualifications of a natural born citizen.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Fake Arab Spring?
programme.desc: Who was really behind a series of revolts, protests, and uprisings that swept the Middle East starting in late 2010?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: End times prophecy experts discuss the possible identity of the antichrist and the timing of his emergence onto the world state.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two alleged alien abductees about their claims they were taken aboard an alien space craft.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: Richard investigates a legendary naval military experiment said to have been carried out at the Philadelphia Naval Shipyard in October 1943.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Assassination of John Lennon
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show travels to New York, LA and Toronto in order to investigate the murder of John Lennon. Several researchers posit that Lennon's supposed killer Mark David Chapman was either a patsy or a mind-controlled assassin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard examines the growing UFO Disclosure movement and its attempts to force the US Government to reveal to the public what it knows about UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: Murder Maps: Notting Hill Horror Part 2

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Bermondsey Horror
programme.desc: In 1849, a man suddenly disappeared in Bermondsey. The discovery that he had been brutally murdered enraptured the press and the public. Even Charles Dickens was totally engrossed in the story of the sinister Marie Manning.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: In 1911, a gun battle on the streets of London, The Siege of Sidney Street the first breaking-news story in history.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: A picture-perfect Canadian couple Karla Homolka and Paul Bernardo join to perform torture and mutilation on young victims - crimes that are virtually unspeakable. Two teenage girls were raped and murdered, and the couple even filmed themselves doing it.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In July 2000, Sarah Payne is abducted and murdered. Roy Whiting, a convicted sex offender, is found guilty and sentenced to life in 2001. Sarah’s case leads to the implementation of “Sarah’s Law” in the UK in 2011.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On June 27, 2005, Dennis Rader, known as the BTK killer, pleads guilty to ten murders he committed in Wichita, Kansas, from 1974 to 1994. After a journalist's article reignites the case, Rader is arrested and sentenced to ten life terms without parole.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Homemade gules to test stickiness; puzzle with a scientific optical illusion; supersonic car.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of genetic modification in Hawaii; shattering a glass; curing a dust allergy through eating worms.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.desc: D.W.'s on her way to Washington and she's bored by it all until she gets lost during a tour of the White House. Then, when Mr. Haney gives Arthur a sealed envelope to bring home to Mom, Arthur fears the worst.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. All Wet/Buster's Dino Dilemma
programme.desc: The Reads are having a wonderful time at the beach, except for D.W. who simply refuses to have fun. Next, Buster and Arthur make a long-awaited field trip to a dinosaur excavation.

programme.title: Arthur: Grandma Thora Appreciation Day/Fern's Slumber Party
programme.desc: Arthur and D.W. are planning a surprise party for Grandma Thora. But amidst the party-planning mayhem, they forget about the guest of honor! Then, shy Fern hosts a slumber party at her mother's urging.

programme.title: Arthur: Making Conversation/A Cloudy Day
programme.desc: Talking to adults makes George want to hide! When he learns he must go to a grown-up party, he turns to his friends for help. Then, Arthur and his friends learn that old silent films can be just as much fun as the movies they’re used to.

programme.title: Arthur: Pick a Car, Any Car/Jenna's Bedtime Blues
programme.desc: The family car is broken, and so is Arthur's heart. How can Mom and Dad even think of replacing it? It’s Muffy's annual slumber party, and Jenna is finally invited! But what if the other girls discover that she's an occasional bed-wetter?

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Back/The Ballad Of Buster Baxter
programme.desc: Buster's coming home! The word spreads fast, but so does the fear that Buster will be different. Then, it seems to Buster, not only have his friends changed while he was gone, but they've forgotten all about him! Will he ever fit in again?

programme.title: Arthur: The Last Day (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: It's a time of change at Lakewood Elementary as Arthur and Buster move up to 4th grade. D.W. and Bud prepare to enter kindergarten and Muffy and Francine contemplate how spending the summer away from each other will affect their friendship.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Power and Persuasion
programme.desc: This episode explores Hitler's approach to propaganda in power; where persuasion was achieved through propaganda and terror, all in service of one goal: the creation of a state under one shared ideology. A new German power fueled by propaganda.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Why We Fight
programme.desc: This episode explores the way Hitler used propaganda to justify his warmongering, reframing it as defense of Germany’s people and borders. It investigates the role propaganda played for both Hitler and the Allies to mobilize their countries for war.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The series begins before WWI when military commanders struggled to understand what uses aviation might have. The Wright Brothers had been the first to fly a powered aircraft in controlled flight in 1903, but even by 1914 aircraft were still underpowered.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The 1920s and 30s were uncertain times for the RAF as well as all other armed services. With peace came cuts in spending on new aircraft development.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: By the end of the war the RAF had aircraft that could escort bombers to targets deep inside Germany and back. With the Gloster Meteor, the RAF had also entered the ‘Jet Age’. Aircraft like the Hawker Hunter and F-86 Sabre took the RAF supersonic.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: Nuclear Stand Off
programme.desc: Nuclear Stand Off: A Greenpeace ship is bombed in 1985, killing Fernando Pereira. The French authorities deny responsibility and questions over nuclear restrictions arise again.

programme.title: Auschwitz Countdown To Liberation
programme.desc: An exceptional documentary that chronicles the liberation of Auschwitz, commencing on the day of liberation and backtracking in time to narrate the tragedy of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Resistance: They Fought Back!
programme.desc: Resistance – They Fought Back provides corrects this myth of Jewish passivity, powerfully illustrating the uprising in ghettos large and small, rebellions in death camps, and armed resistance in the forests.

programme.title: Africa's Claws & Jaws
programme.desc: Explore the venomous dangers posed by snakes, spiders and scorpions.

programme.title: Monkey Island

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deception

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie, Duncan Moore. But when Andy and Duncan respond to a messy homicide at a pawnshop, it’s clear this rookie is going to give Andy the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When Father Anton, a priest who has been questioning his faith, stumbles and hits his head, he suddenly begins to see demons all about him. When those demons bestow upon him the power over life and death, he uses it…but nothing comes without a cost.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When Sharon Rosman's son is abducted his 6-year-old sister is the only witness but is far too traumatized to speak. When psychologist John Holland comes to work with the young girl, she tells him it was the boogeyman…from under the bed.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Dropped out of space by a chunk of dark matter, pilot Paul Stein (John Heard) discovers a derelict ship lost ten years ago with all hands, including his long-lost brother. Only it seems that the crew may not quite be dead…or alive.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Henry Marshall (Frank Whaley) is a greedy man. Recently released from prison, Marshall has learned little from his experiences. But an encounter with alien beings (Rebecca De Mornay and John Savage) may just teach him a thing or two.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When a group of astronauts returning to Earth after an expedition to Mars discovers what appears to be a dangerous alien life form on their ship, they must decide whether to return to Earth or sacrifice themselves for the sake of all humanity?

programme.title: Nine Men

programme.title: Convoy

programme.title: A Window in London

programme.desc: Parker is lured into a trap and confronted with a deadly choice: reveal a dark secret from his past or lose his life.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU must rescue a young woman after she’s been abducted by a delusional man who insists she is his missing daughter.

programme.desc: The A-Team helps a group of overworked and underpaid farm workers institute a union but their boss has other ideas.

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton are taken hostage by a group of terrorists threatening to take over a nearby city.

programme.desc: MacGyver is shocked when he learns that the thief who stole a vial of deadly bacteria from the Phoenix Foundation is an old friend who once saved his life.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Mutant X

programme.title: Mutant X

programme.title: Mutant X

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: Mutant X tracks down a rogue scientist while Shalimar breaks away from the team to help Adam save the scientist — and uncover the real bad guy.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: Despite their wild success the cracks begin to show. With the departure of their star, Cubby Broccoli and Harry Saltzman must find a new actor to play the super-spy, adding tension to a strained relationship. How disastrous can their new choice be?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: Though diamonds may be forever, Connery wasn’t. The producers need a new star and their choice revolutionizes the character. Embracing the cultural changes of the 70s takes Bond to new heights, but for one producer it would be the end of an era.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: With an aging actor in the lead and a new director in charge, the Battle of the Bonds divides the franchise before a new gritty take on the character nearly drives it to ruin. But it's the studio that threatens to deliver the finishing blow to Bond.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: With the troubles of the 80s behind them, is there a place for Bond in the modern world? With a new generation of producers in charge and the fate of the studio in their hands, can Pierce Brosnan defy expectations and revitalize the franchise?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: James Bond
programme.desc: Producers make a risky bet and forgo the tried-and-true formula. Acquiring the long-estranged film rights to Fleming’s first novel, Casino Royale, they recast Bond with the least likely actor imagined and see if they can reinvent the spy one more time.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Devil Doll
programme.desc: A guide leads Sydney and Nigel to an unusual, underground Aztec burial chamber. Instead of a body, they find a relic.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Incognito
programme.desc: Retrieving a mythical lancet, Sydney and Nigel run into Nigel's look-alike just before his death. Nigel gets a cut from the lancet. Later, Cate persuades Nigel to impersonate the man.
